title: Silver Shield
description: Adds a recipe for shields using silver. The Ice and Fire mod is required for this to work.
body:
Requires the [Ice and Fire mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/ice-and-fire-dragons) to work.

Adds a simple recipe for shields using silver ingots.

![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6cVSKilq/images/daf5dc27e3847df7cf32bd8c22223961f9fa3a9a.png)
